contract.additionalFeeInformation: Additional fees and charges may apply. Please see the AGL fee schedules at agl.com.au/fees

fee.description: May be charged when manually reconnecting or reading your meter when you move into a property or change retailer. Incl GST. Fees may vary.
May be charged when manually disconnecting or reading your meter when you move out of a property or change retailer. Incl GST. Fees may vary.
Fee may be charged when remotely reconnecting your meter when you move into a property or change retailer. Includes GST. Fees may vary.
Fee may be charged when remotely disconnecting your meter when you move out of a property or change retailer. Includes GST. Fees may vary.
Fee may be charged when manually disconnecting your meter in other circumstances, such as non-payment. Includes GST. Fees may vary.
May be charged when manually reconnecting in other circumstances, such as after disconnection for non-payment. Includes GST. Fees may vary
A late payment fee may be charged when full payment has not been received by the bill due date. This amount is not subject to GST
The amount is GST inclusive and applies to card payments made at Australia Post outlets.
An over the counter payment fee may apply for payments made in-person at a Post Office. Includes GST.
A paper bill fee may apply for each bill sent by post. Includes GST.
The amount is GST inclusive and applies to payments made by Visa debit cards.
The amount is GST inclusive and applies to payments made by Visa credit cards.
The amount is GST inclusive and applies to payments made by Mastercard debit cards.
The amount is GST inclusive and applies to payments made by Mastercard credit cards.

touBlock.name: Residential Time of Use Off peak

contract.variation: This plan also includes variable rates, retail fees and charges, which can change at any time with notice to you. If we vary your rates, we will give you at least 5 business days prior notice of the variation. Other charges may be varied with notice to you.
contract.onExpiry: Your market contract is ongoing. From time to time, AGL reviews its offers and this offer will be reviewed with consideration to AGL's generally available market offers

greenCharge.name: Green Power Charge
greenCharge.description: For $1 per week inc. GST we ensure energy equal to 20% of your usage will be fed into the grid from Accredited GreenPower generators.

greenCharge.name: Green Power Charge
greenCharge.description: For 4.4c /kWh inc. GST we ensure energy equal to 100% of your usage will be fed into the grid from Accredited GreenPower generators.

incentive.name: Three for Free Usage
incentive.description: Free electricity usage applies from 10am to 1pm every day. Daily supply charges still apply. This rate can change with notice to you.

incentive.name: $150 sign up credit
incentive.description: For new & moving AGL customers who stay with AGL at the same address for 90 days from start of the plan. Credit will appear on next bill after 90 days. Non-transferable. Accounts may be excluded from receiving more than one credit per fuel in 12 months

contract.terms: This offer applies to customers with a smart meter and an applicable network tariff. For full eligibility criteria, or for further information about the terms and conditions applicable to this energy offer, please contact AGL on 131 245 or visit agl.com.au.

planData.planName: Three for Free - New to AGL (No Exit Fee)
